protein_name: Exhibits microtubule-destabilizing activity, which is antagonized by STAT3. Belongs to the stathmin family. Neuron specific. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: axon; cytoplasm; cytosol; Golgi apparatus; growth cone; neuron projection
raw_fields.Molecular Function: protein binding; protein domain specific binding; tubulin binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: cytoplasmic microtubule organization; microtubule depolymerization; negative regulation of neuron projection development; negative regulation of Rac protein signal transduction; nervous system development; neuron projection development; regulation of cytoskeleton organization; regulation of microtubule polymerization or depolymerization
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: SCG10-like protein; SCG10-like-protein; SCLIP; stathmin 3; Stathmin-3; stathmin-like 3; STMN3
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 6.99 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
